community_notes.excerpt: Reddit daily discussion identifies the enemy name as Alpha Firefly.
Steam discussion mentions Alpha Firefly as a normal enemy target in Into the Breach tactics.
Reddit search results include Alpha Firefly mentions and Firefly enemy discussion, corroborating the displayed Alpha Firefly name for a higher-tier Firefly Vek.
Steam discussion search did not surface a precise Alpha Firefly catalog entry; related Firefly threads confirm this is an Into the Breach Vek attack family.
